semantic_description: Pure scalar arithmetic predicate over two integer inputs. Under the precondition 0 < b, the function tests whether a is divisible by b using the C remainder operator, returns 1 on the divisible branch, and returns 0 otherwise. It has straight-line control with one if branch, performs no memory mutation, and the postcondition relates the return value to an existential or universal integer multiple relation over the pre-state inputs.
